title: navarretia squarrosa
intro: Navarretia squarrosa, also known as Square-stemmed Navarretia, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Navarretia squarrosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Navarretia squarrosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
